videoDirection.paletteTypeSource: Repository visual tokens with neutral background, green plant tissue, blue water, yellow light, orange/purple minerals and sugars.
videoDirection.safeZones: Keep all labels inside a 64 px edge margin; reserve the top-left corner for a small topic label only.
videoDirection.captionPolicy: No captions; silent video with concise diagram labels.
videoDirection.rhythm: Every shot has entrance, development, and settle phases; avoid static holds longer than two seconds.
heldScenes: The final cycle holds briefly after the seed return path completes.

scenes.title: Seed Awakens
scenes.viewerTask: see inputs reach the seed and trigger the first root
rejectedAlternatives: radial hub would imply a full cycle too early
split screen would weaken the seed as the focal object
scenes.choiceRationale: The seed must pass the squint test as the single origin of the process.
scenes.focal: swelling seed with emerging root tip
scenes.layout: Seed centered slightly below midline, input particles above and around it, soil band in the lower half.
scenes.hierarchy: Seed is largest; input particles are smaller and motion-led.
scenes.safeZones: Labels stay outside the seed ellipse and inside 80 px margins.

motionPhases.name: entrance
motionPhases.visualChange: water and oxygen approach the seed

validationChecks: seed is readable in contact sheet
root tip is visible by final frame
input particles do not collide with labels
risks: Inputs could look decorative if they do not enter the seed.

scenes.title: Roots Feed
scenes.viewerTask: trace particles from soil into roots
rejectedAlternatives: grid board would hide the branching root mechanic
centered hero would not show enough soil reach
scenes.choiceRationale: A vertical spine lets the taproot anchor the scene while branches collect resources.
scenes.armature: vertical flow spine with branch lanes
scenes.layout: Root spine centered; branch roots spread left and right; resource dots live in outer soil lanes.
scenes.hierarchy: Root spine first, moving uptake particles second.
scenes.safeZones: Outer labels stay above branch endpoints and do not overlap root hairs.
validationChecks: particles visibly enter root hair regions
upward stream is distinguishable from downward growth
risks: Too many root hairs could turn into visual noise.

scenes.title: Shoot Finds Light
scenes.viewerTask: watch the plant move from underground start to light capture
rejectedAlternatives: split screen would separate shoot and light even though the mechanic is reaching
scenes.choiceRationale: The diagonal from lower-left root base to upper-right light makes upward growth directional.
scenes.layout: Stem starts near lower center and rises into upper-right sun rays; leaves unfold near the ray field.
scenes.hierarchy: Stem motion first, leaf unfolding second, light rays third.
scenes.safeZones: Sun rays do not cover leaf labels; leaves stay below the top 64 px margin.

motionPhases.name: settle
motionPhases.visualChange: light particles land on leaf surfaces

validationChecks: leaves are not fully visible in the first third of the shot
risks: Sun rays could dominate the focal plant if too saturated.

scenes.title: Leaf Makes Sugar
scenes.viewerTask: follow inputs into the leaf and outputs away from it
rejectedAlternatives: full-width strip would flatten the conversion chamber
radial hub would make inputs and outputs look equivalent
scenes.choiceRationale: A large leaf can dominate the left/center while output lanes occupy the right side.
scenes.layout: Large leaf spans left and center; inputs enter from top/left/bottom; output lanes leave to the right.
scenes.hierarchy: Leaf first, moving packets second, small labels third.
scenes.safeZones: Formula label stays in a fixed lower-right panel and does not cover output packets.

motionPhases.name: entrance
motionPhases.visualChange: light, CO2, and water enter leaf

motionPhases.name: settle
motionPhases.visualChange: sugars leave through veins and O2 exits to air

validationChecks: CO2 and O2 directions are not confused
sugar packets do not cover the fixed formula panel
risks: Photosynthesis can become text-heavy if the conversion is not spatially clear.

scenes.title: Growth Zones
scenes.viewerTask: see transport routes feed new cell growth
rejectedAlternatives: centered full plant would hide the cell-level proof
grid board would lose transport direction
scenes.choiceRationale: The plant remains the hero while magnified tips prove where growth happens.
scenes.focal: full plant plus magnified growth zones
scenes.armature: dominant plant field with two supporting magnifier fields
scenes.layout: Plant occupies left/center; two cell magnifier panels sit right-top and right-bottom.
scenes.hierarchy: Transport routes first, cell division second, whole plant third.
scenes.safeZones: Cell panels keep labels inside their borders with 16 px internal padding.

motionPhases.name: entrance
motionPhases.visualChange: xylem and phloem streams appear with direction

motionPhases.name: development
motionPhases.visualChange: sugar packets route to shoot and root tips

motionPhases.name: settle
motionPhases.visualChange: cell tiles split and enlarge in both panels

validationChecks: xylem arrows go up and phloem arrows route away from leaves
new cell tiles animate in both panels
side panels do not read as unrelated cards
risks: Side panels could feel like UI cards if over-bordered.

scenes.title: Cycle Continues
scenes.viewerTask: understand that mature plants make seeds and restart the cycle
rejectedAlternatives: linear timeline would imply a terminal endpoint
centered hero would not show return
scenes.choiceRationale: The radial cycle is only used when continuation is the lesson.
scenes.armature: radial lifecycle ring around the plant
scenes.layout: Cycle nodes sit around the center plant; final seed packets travel back to the seed node.
scenes.hierarchy: Cycle ring first, mature plant second, labels third.
scenes.safeZones: Radial labels sit inside the ring and stay clear of frame edges.

motionPhases.name: settle
motionPhases.visualChange: seed packets complete the cycle ring

validationChecks: final path returns to seed node
cycle is not introduced before the closing shot
final hold is brief but readable
risks: The radial ring can become decorative if seed packets do not complete it.
